arts.ttl: Hatters chief had considered signing Luton promotion hero Drameh ahead of Hull return
arts.sum: Tigers have two former Town players in their ranks

arts.ttl: Hull City must cut out 'soft' goals as Tigers target pivotal week
arts.sum: City are without a clean sheet since the third game of the season and have struggled for goals, while Rob Edwards' Hatters have shipped 26 since slipping back into the Championship after relegation from the Premier League, the worst record in the division, bar bottom side QPR. Goalkeeper Ivor Pandur says it's imperative Hull City find a way of keeping Luton Town at bay when the two sides meet in a basement battle at Kenilworth Road on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Defender returns for Luton but ligament damage could keep Hatters wingback out until the new year
arts.sum: Burke back as Doughty faces spell on the sidelines

arts.ttl: Hatter boss vows to work on mental well-being after admitting Luton's poor run has affected him
arts.sum: Town manager discusses difficult run of results this season

arts.ttl: Town chief appreciates the 'heartening' support he has received from Luton's board following Boro debacle
arts.sum: Edwards thanks CEO Gary Sweet following ‘positive’ discussions

arts.ttl: Hull City must stand up to the Luton Town fight in bid to win the war
arts.sum: Their form at Kenilworth Road is the one relative shining light of an otherwise miserable start - three wins and defeats with two draws is their record so far, but their 5-1 thumping at Middlesbrough before the break will go one of two ways when Saturday's game gets going. Luton Town may have endured a nightmare start to the Championship season, and boss Rob Edwards may be fighting to save his job, but Hull City can still expect one of their toughest assignments yet on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Spirited Edwards is more determined than ever to turn things around at Luton
arts.sum: Boss eager to be a success with the Hatters
International football is consigned to the memory bank for 2024 and there is a full slate of Championship action this weekend as Phil Agius previews all 12 games.
